name: insurance-verification
description: MEOK AI Labs — Insurance eligibility verification, prior authorization, claims, and fraud detection.

tools.name: verify_eligibility
tools.description: Verify patient insurance eligibility with coverage details, copay, deductible, and network status.

tools.name: prior_authorization_check
tools.description: Check if a treatment requires prior authorization with estimated approval timeline and documentation needs.

tools.name: claim_status
tools.description: Check insurance claim status with processing stage, payment details, and timeline.

tools.name: fraud_indicators
tools.description: Analyze a claim for fraud indicators with risk scoring, pattern detection, and recommendations.
